```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.52em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:1em;">
  For general work (editing, coding, reading), borrow from the open-source market.
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.9em;align-items:stretch;">

  <a class="tool-card" href="https://github.com/affaan-m/ecc" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.05em 1.1em;text-align:left;border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.22);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.16);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:2em;height:2em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="boxes" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.66em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">Everything Claude Code</div>
   </div>
   <div style="display:inline-block;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;border-radius:999px;padding:0.18em 0.6em;margin-bottom:0.55em;letter-spacing:0.05em;">kitchen sink</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;">Expansive, all-inclusive. Its own README advises installing <strong style="color:#5654A2;">selectively</strong>.</div>
  </a>

  <a class="tool-card" href="https://github.com/tw93/Waza" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="background:#FFFBF3;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.05em 1.1em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.16);border:1px solid #C8E6C9;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:2em;height:2em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #C8E6C9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="feather" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-size:0.66em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">Waza</div>
   </div>
   <div style="display:inline-block;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#2C8475;background:#E8F5E9;border:1px solid #C8E6C9;border-radius:999px;padding:0.18em 0.6em;margin-bottom:0.55em;letter-spacing:0.05em;">8 skills</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;">Deliberately minimal. Covers the common cases of everyday development, coding and otherwise.</div>
  </a>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.9em;text-align:center;font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.5;">
  Anything specific to <strong style="color:#564232;">your</strong> workflow, you author yourself. That's next.
 </div>

</div>
```
